_note: Recipe feed: 6-10 dinner candidates, viral or highly-rated. Refreshed every ~3 weeks by GHA cron.

items.title: Filipino Beef Short Ribs Adobo
items.note: The Kitchn editors have been talking about this one all year, braises overnight into something better, soy and vinegar do the work.

items.title: Homemade Doner Kebab
items.note: Viral right now for good reason, no vertical rotisserie needed, tastes like the real thing according to everyone making it weekly.

items.title: One-Pan Harissa Orange Chicken and Broccoli
items.note: Kelli Foster's one-pan answer to weeknight cooking, harissa paste and orange juice, actually stays interesting.

items.title: Creamy Cajun Pasta
items.note: Rachel Perlmutter's one-pot creamy situation, Cajun spice does the lifting, fewer dishes than you think possible.

items.title: Trader Joe's Soup Dumpling Bake
items.note: Soyaki, red curry sauce, coconut milk, frozen dumplings baked into a casserole, been blowing up social for weeks now.

items.title: Espagueti Verde
items.note: Janette Zepeda's green pasta with poblanos and crema, different enough from your weekly pesto to justify the blender cleanup.

items.title: Viral Chuck Roast (Salt and Pepper Only)
items.note: Just salt, pepper, covered, one hour per pound at 325, hundreds of messages saying kids are eating it, that tells you something.

items.title: Crispy Roast Potatoes
items.note: Kenji's most-saved recipe on Serious Eats right now, boil then roast method, crispiest you will ever make, promise.
